# `fnox daemon`

- **Usage**: `fnox daemon <SUBCOMMAND>`

Manage the per-user daemon

## Subcommands

- [`fnox daemon clear`](/cli/daemon/clear.md)
- [`fnox daemon start`](/cli/daemon/start.md)
- [`fnox daemon status`](/cli/daemon/status.md)
